rule: Critical metrics MUST NOT change without explicit justification. If they differ: VIOLATION.

critical_metrics.rationale: grounding_state_v3.json at UUID path confirms total_ceu=10. Generic pipeline reads same file in Phase 4. Value is consistent and deterministic.
grounding_state_v3.json SOURCE_TRUTH=10, grounding_ratio=1.0. No discrepancy in source data.
grounding_ratio=1.0 confirmed in grounding_state_v3.json. Consistent across vault coverage_state and gauge derivation.

dom_path_domain_layer.json does not exist. Source artifact (40.3 structural topology) not present in repo. Cannot verify node count against original source. The 35-node value in the vault is derived from the absent DOM file. No violation detected — value is internally consistent within baseline artifacts.
Same as topology node count — DOM file absent. Value internally consistent.
4 signals defined in global signal model (PSIG-001, -002, -004, -006). Consistent across all baseline artifacts.
PSIG-001=5.663 HIGH, PSIG-002=3.2098 HIGH, PSIG-004=2.1822 HIGH — all exceed threshold 2.0. PSIG-006=0 ACTIVATED (telemetry). Count=3 is deterministic from signal values and threshold.

Score formula is deterministic: coverage_points=round(100.0*0.35)=35, reconstruction_points=round(1.0*25)=25, completion_points=0 (NOT_EVALUATED). Total=60. Generic Phase 8a would produce identical value from same inputs.
Projected=100 when execution layer achievable. Deterministic from GAUGE model. Consistent.
CONDITIONAL band is determined by canonical=60 (below execution threshold). Deterministic from score.

1 active pressure zone (PZ-001) — consistent across 75.x/pressure_zone_state.json, 41.x/pressure_zone_projection.json, vault/signal_registry.json, and binding/binding_envelope.json. Internally consistent.
COMPOUND_ZONE classification is deterministic: condition_count=3 >= 3 triggers COMPOUND_ZONE rule. Consistent across all 75.x artifacts.

Decision state is not produced by generic pipeline. It exists only in UUID run artifacts (PIOS_40.7 pipeline). Not a violation — the generic pipeline does not have a decision phase. This is a scope gap.

overall_note: All computable critical metrics are consistent between baseline and what the generic pipeline would produce. Topology node/domain count and decision semantics are NOT_COMPARABLE due to absent source artifacts and pipeline scope gap respectively — these are gaps, not violations. No metric contradicts the baseline.
